title: Understanding the Problem
text: To find the components of the force, we need to determine the change in velocity and use the mass of the drone.

title: Calculate Change in Velocity
text: The initial velocity is $$3.00i$$ $$\frac{m}{s}$$ and the final velocity is $$9i+4j$$ $$\frac{m}{s}$$. Calculate the change in velocity.

title: Change in Velocity
text: What is the change in velocity?

title: Use Newton's Second Law
text: Newton's second law states that force is equal to mass times acceleration. Use this to find the force components.

title: Calculate Acceleration
text: Acceleration is the change in velocity divided by time. What is the acceleration?

title: Calculate Force Components
text: Using the mass of the drone $$(1.50$$ kg) and the acceleration, calculate the force components.
